name: chembl-mcp-server
description: Drug-discovery data over ChEMBL — compounds, protein targets, bioactivity, mechanisms, indications.

interface.shortDescription: Drug-discovery data over ChEMBL — compounds, protein targets, bioactivity, mechanisms, indications.
interface.longDescription: Expose ChEMBL (EBI) over MCP — the curated link between compounds, protein targets, and measured bioactivity (IC50/Ki/EC50), plus drug mechanisms and clinical indications. Find compounds by name or structure, resolve a UniProt accession to a ChEMBL target, pull the most potent leads against it, look up a drug's mechanism and indications, and SQL large bioactivity sets via a DataCanvas spill.
